## beehiiv custom-fields

Manage publication custom fields

### Synopsis

Create, inspect, update, replace, and delete custom fields for the active publication.

```
beehiiv custom-fields [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv custom-fields list
beehiiv custom-fields show custom_field_123
beehiiv custom-fields create --body '{"kind":"string","display":"Favorite Airport"}'
beehiiv fields add --body @custom-field.json
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for custom-fields
```

```
      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL
      --compact                 Print compact JSON

      --debug                   Print request URLs to stderr
      --output string           Choose the output format (json, table, raw)
      --publication-id string   Override the Beehiiv publication ID
      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit

      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
```
